name: sync-conflict
notes: NFT-8 REAL per Wave A19-T11. Measures two-client concurrent edit + Yjs CRDT merge + CRDTConflictResolver 3-way auto-merge + CONFLICTED state detection. Replaces the WallStore LWW proxy (Wave A13 era). CONFLICTED state is set when autoMerge returns null (string/semantic conflict) — user sees ConflictResolutionDialog.
